definitions: To talk about something that has been worrying you for a long time, often something you have kept secret.
To confess a problem or secret to someone, feeling relieved afterwards.
examples: I need to get something off my chest.
It felt good to finally get it off my chest.
She got it off her chest and felt much better.
lemma: to get something off your chest
synonyms: to make a clean breast of it
source: to get something off your chest
